title: Miner's Icons
description: Adds icons for mobs and entities that tries to match the 3d model without going beyond 32 by 32.
body:
**A icon resource pack that tries to match the 3d models.**

# Supported Minimaps
> - **Xaero's Minimap**
> - **JourneyMap**

<details>
  <summary>
    Supported Mods
  </summary>

  **Below are the supported mods**

  <details>
    <summary>
      Cobblemon
    </summary>
    
**Below are the supported addons**
    
> -   **Cobblemon**
> -   **Cobblemon Delta**
> -   **Galatica's fakemon, By Me (unavailable to the public for now)**
  
  </details>

> -  **Minecraft (No mobs supported yet)**
> -  **Alex's Caves**
> -  **Alex's Mobs**
  
</details>

## Reasons updates may take a while.

**I have other projects that I work on, and on the discord you can see some of them.**
